method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm at 120 DPI after adding nearby citations for the singular-vector perturbation claim and the discussion's BBP-threshold reference. Verified pdfinfo reports 22 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus changed pages 2 and 16 at full size. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
